mapper.select: SELECT uo.user_id, uo.organization_id, uo.reg_id, uo.reg_dt, uo.chg_id, uo.chg_dt, uo.del_id, uo.del_dt, uo.del_yn FROM user_organization uo INNER JOIN organization o ON uo.organization_id = o.organization_id INNER JOIN user u ON uo.user_id = u.user_id WHERE uo.member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT uo.user_id, uo.organization_id, uo.reg_id, uo.reg_dt, uo.chg_id, uo.chg_dt, uo.del_id, uo.del_dt, uo.del_yn FROM user_organization uo INNER JOIN organization o ON uo.organization_id = o.organization_id INNER JOIN user u ON uo.user_id = u.user_id WHERE uo.organization_id = #{organizationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_organization ( user_id, organization_id, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{organizationId}, #{regId}, COALESCE(#{regDt}, NOW()), #{chgId}, COALESCE(#{chgDt}, NOW()), #{delYn} )

INSERT INTO user_organization ( user_id, organization_id, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES
( #{userOrganization.userId}, #{userOrganization.organizationId}, #{userOrganization.regId}, COALESCE(#{userOrganization.regDt}, NOW()), #{userOrganization.chgId}, COALESCE(#{userOrganization.chgDt}, NOW()), #{userOrganization.delYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM user_organization uo INNER JOIN organization o ON uo.organization_id = o.organization_id INNER JOIN user u ON uo.user_id = u.user_id WHERE uo.member_id = #{memberId} AND uo.organization_id = #{organizationId} )

SELECT uo.user_id, uo.organization_id, uo.reg_id, uo.reg_dt, uo.chg_id, uo.chg_dt, uo.del_id, uo.del_dt, uo.del_yn FROM user_organization uo INNER JOIN user u ON uo.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN organization o ON uo.organization_id = o.organization_id WHERE (uo.user_id, uo.organization_id) IN
(#{userOrganization.userId}, #{userOrganization.organizationId})
mapper.update:
UPDATE user_organization SET del_yn = CASE
WHEN (user_id = #{userOrganization.userId} AND organization_id = #{userOrganization.organizationId}) THEN #{userOrganization.delYn}
ELSE del_yn END, chg_id = CASE
WHEN (user_id = #{userOrganization.userId} AND organization_id = #{userOrganization.organizationId}) THEN #{userOrganization.chgId}
ELSE chg_id END, chg_dt = CASE
WHEN (user_id = #{userOrganization.userId} AND organization_id = #{userOrganization.organizationId}) THEN COALESCE(#{userOrganization.chgDt}, NOW())
ELSE chg_dt END, del_id = CASE
WHEN (user_id = #{userOrganization.userId} AND organization_id = #{userOrganization.organizationId}) THEN #{userOrganization.delId}
ELSE del_id END, del_dt = CASE
WHEN (user_id = #{userOrganization.userId} AND organization_id = #{userOrganization.organizationId}) THEN COALESCE(#{userOrganization.delDt}, NOW())
ELSE del_dt END WHERE (user_id, organization_id) IN
(#{userOrganization.userId}, #{userOrganization.organizationId})
